who: bookkeepers managing 10–20 invoices/week for small businesses using QuickBooks
offer: For bookkeepers managing 10–20 invoices/week, manual data entry causes cash flow gaps. We extract and consolidate invoice data instead of manual data entry into QuickBooks.
problem: Manual data entry from PDFs is time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for bookkeepers seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about similar workflows
DM outreach to bookkeepers with demo video
Share insights in community forums for bookkeepers
try_it: Let users try data consolidation into a spreadsheet for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing invoice data
Enable one-click export for simple reports
Reduce steps required in onboarding process
